classification.reasoning: The patch involves structural changes to the AlterTableClient class, including adding new logic to filter dangling indices by UUID during resize operations. It modifies request classes to support filtering, updates transport actions to handle filtered requests, and adjusts version compatibility logic. The patch also adds new tests and modifies integration tests to cover concurrency scenarios. The changes are not simple string replacements or whitespace fixes, but involve method additions, new fields, and conditional logic, indicating structural changes consistent with TYPE_III complexity. The confidence is high but not absolute due to some exact matches in localization and some fuzzy matches in the patch. The token budget estimate is moderate given the size and complexity of the patch.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of ResizeResponse and Metadata classes to support new logic involving resize responses and cluster metadata.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling of resize responses and access to cluster metadata for enhanced resize operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced logic to detect stale indices related to the source index by scanning cluster metadata for indices whose resize source UUID matches the source index UUID.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AlterTableClient, method handling resize operation preparation
hunk_descriptions.intent: To identify and track any stale indices that might interfere with the resize operation, enabling their cleanup before proceeding.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed resize execution to conditionally perform garbage collection of stale dangling indices before executing the resize request, based on presence of a stale index UUID.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure cleanup of stale dangling indices related to previous resize operations before starting a new resize, preventing conflicts or resource leaks.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed the deleteTempIndices method and its invocation, effectively eliminating a prior step that cleaned up dangling artifacts before resize.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To simplify the resize process by removing redundant or replaced cleanup logic, now handled conditionally elsewhere.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored GCDanglingArtifactsRequest to support specifying a list of index UUIDs to delete; added serialization logic for this list and a static instance representing deletion of all dangling indices.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable targeted garbage collection of specific dangling indices by UUID, improving control over cleanup operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Enhanced the handling of GCDanglingArtifactsRequest to delete either all dangling indices or only those specified by UUIDs, by checking if the request's UUID list is empty and iterating accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support selective garbage collection of dangling indices, allowing cleanup of specific indices rather than always all dangling indices.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced usage of the singleton GCDanglingArtifactsRequest.INSTANCE with the new GCDanglingArtifactsRequest.ALL static instance when executing the garbage collection action.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To align with the updated GCDanglingArtifactsRequest API that distinguishes between all and specific UUIDs for deletion requests.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new version constants V_6_0_4 and V_6_1_1 to the Version class, updating the versioning scheme.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To introduce new version identifiers for compatibility and feature gating in the codebase.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of java.util.List to support new logic involving lists in the TransportResize class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of List collections in the class, likely for handling multiple UUIDs or requests.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified the resize response handling to perform targeted garbage collection of dangling artifacts by passing a list containing the resized index UUID when the resize operation is not acknowledged, instead of deleting all dangling artifacts.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To limit garbage collection to only the resized index's dangling artifacts on failure, avoiding unnecessary cleanup of unrelated indices.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of ResizeResponse and Metadata classes to support new logic involving resize responses and cluster metadata.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling of resize operation responses and access to cluster metadata for enhanced resize operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced logic to scan cluster metadata for any existing indices that are resize targets of the source index, capturing a stale index UUID if found.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AlterTableClient, method handling resize operation preparation
hunk_descriptions.intent: To detect and identify any stale resized indices related to the source index before performing a new resize, enabling cleanup or special handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed resize execution to conditionally perform garbage collection of stale dangling indices before executing the resize request if a stale index UUID was detected.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure that any stale dangling indices related to previous resize operations are cleaned up before initiating a new resize, preventing conflicts or resource leaks.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed the deleteTempIndices method and its invocation, effectively eliminating a prior step that deleted temporary indices before resize.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To simplify or change the cleanup strategy by removing the generic deletion of temporary indices, possibly replaced by more targeted cleanup logic elsewhere.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored GCDanglingArtifactsRequest to support specifying a list of index UUIDs to delete; added serialization logic for this list and a static instance representing deletion of all dangling indices.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable targeted garbage collection of dangling indices by specifying which indices to delete, improving control over cleanup operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Enhanced the logic to delete dangling indices either for all dangling indices if no UUIDs specified, or selectively for provided index UUIDs, checking existence and relation metadata accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: TransportGCDanglingArtifacts, method handling dangling artifacts deletion
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support selective garbage collection of dangling indices based on provided UUIDs, allowing more precise cleanup operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the execution call to use the new static ALL instance of GCDanglingArtifactsRequest instead of the previous INSTANCE singleton.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To align with the updated GCDanglingArtifactsRequest API that differentiates between deleting all dangling indices and selective deletion.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new version constants V_6_0_4 and V_6_1_1 to the Version class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To introduce new version identifiers for compatibility and feature gating in the codebase.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of java.util.List to support new list-based operations in the class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable use of List collections in the TransportResize class for enhanced functionality.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified the error handling path after a failed resize acknowledgment to perform targeted garbage collection of the resized index UUID instead of a generic cleanup; also adjusted lambda parameter names for clarity.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve cleanup precision by deleting only the resized index's dangling artifacts when resize fails, aiding in better resource management and error recovery.
